expectations.text: Writes the failing spec BEFORE writing the implementation
expectations.evidence: Follows scaffold → spec → verify red → implement → verify green order

expectations.text: Scope test includes a non-matching record (archived contact) to prove exclusion
expectations.evidence: Creates 4 let! records including archived_same_account — all three exclusion axes covered

expectations.text: Scope test includes a cross-account contact to prove account scoping
Uses contain_exactly or equivalent (not just include, which can't prove exclusion)
Scaffolds the empty scope method before the first test run (avoiding NameError red)
expectations.evidence: Scaffolds `scope :active, ->(_account) { none }` so failure is behavioral, not NameError
